title: viburnum opulus var. nanum
intro: Viburnum opulus var. nanum, also known as the Dwarf Guelder Rose, is a compact, deciduous shrub that belongs to the Adoxaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects, which have been attributed to the presence of compounds such as viburnine and isoflavones. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Viburnum opulus var. nanum can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to treat a range of conditions, including skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues.
